editorialSummary.text: Celebrated local sushi chain serving traditional rolls & sake in a chic, intimate space.

text.text:
Revisited SUGARFISH with my lovely wife and we were just as amazed as we were the first time around. We had a whole process of visiting as a guest and regardless if we were guest or not, the experience was fantastic as a whole.

I'm big on sushi bars/restaurants presenting their dishes in a certain pattern/style and the speed matters as well.

SUGARFISH does a great job at this as their set menus are the way to go although I see plenty going with a la carte which is also a great choice.
My go to menu set here is the "Nozawa Trust Me" which has Edamame, Tuna/Chutoro Sashimi, Albacore, Salmon, & Sea Bream Rolls, Toro & Blue Crab Hand Rolls, Yellowtail & Hirame Sushi. Love their selections overall and can get you super full. They're all very delicious but my favorite has to go to the blue crab hand roll which is presented last on the menu set. Best for last as it's just super savory, melts in your mouth and has a great aftertaste, love it as a whole.

Overall, a wonderful experience once again and it's say to safe that SUGARFISH is on top of my list when it comes to all time favorite restaurants. Interior is always clean and the lighting is perfect for a date. They do such a wonderful job at presenting and making their dishes. Vibes are always great and it's such a good spot for any occasion. Special shout out to the General Manager Joshua and their staff team for making the experience extra special, excited to visit again soon!

text.text: Sugarfish Pasadena is simple, sleek, and all about letting the sushi shine. The Trust Me menu is the way to go — a curated selection of fresh, high-quality nigiri and rolls that consistently hits the mark. The vibe is casual but polished, service is efficient, and while it’s a bit pricey, it’s worth it for a reliable, no-fuss sushi experience.

originalText.text: Sugarfish Pasadena is simple, sleek, and all about letting the sushi shine. The Trust Me menu is the way to go — a curated selection of fresh, high-quality nigiri and rolls that consistently hits the mark. The vibe is casual but polished, service is efficient, and while it’s a bit pricey, it’s worth it for a reliable, no-fuss sushi experience.

text.text:
Great sushi spot near Malibu!

I visited my second daughter who attends school nearby. Since this is a very popular spot, we expected a wait. My wife arrived first to put our names down, but even then, we had to wait over 40 minutes. It was actually nice to walk around the nearby shops while waiting.

Important: They strictly check that your entire party is present before seating you.

The interior is dimly lit and cozy (a bit tight, but intimate). We ordered the "Trust Me ($36)" course. The sushi is served piece by piece, and it was delicious. At first, I wondered if the portions would be enough, but by the end of the meal, I was completely full and satisfied.

Highly recommended if you are looking for a stylish and tasty sushi place in this area. The evening lighting adds a wonderful vibe!

text.text:
Ok. So I have to start out by saying im not a big fan of sushi. Im your typical California roll or fried sushi. Having said that this place changed the way I think about sushi! I always wondered how real Japanese sushi would taste and I have a feeling this place is certainly close to that. I had recently watched a documentary on Netflix and how this one place in Japan you just trust the chef to serve you delicious 😋 sushi! Well this is place does the same and boy it doesn't disappoint. I've never had salmon melt in my mouth like that or had sushi rice taste sooo good. And the ginger ! Thats real stuff

I would highly recommend this place. Will certainly be coming back.

text.text:
SUGARFISH in Pasadena was excellent as always. Every dish was fresh, delicious, and beautifully prepared, but what really stood out was the exceptional service. The team went above and beyond to address and resolve an issue with a birthday club meal, and they handled it with genuine care and professionalism.

We came on a Monday at 12 pm and there was zero wait, which made the experience even better. Great food, outstanding service, and a consistently wonderful experience. Highly recommend!
